services.title: Teeth Whitening
services.name: Teeth Whitening
services.description: Get a radiant, confident smile with our professional teeth whitening services. We use advanced, enamel-safe bleaching techniques that effectively remove years of stubborn stains from coffee, tea, and smoking in just one session. Enjoy immediate, long-lasting results with minimal sensitivity.

services.title: Dental Bonding
services.name: Dental Bonding
services.description: Restore the natural appearance of your teeth with high-quality dental bonding. Using a tooth-colored composite resin, we seamlessly repair chipped, cracked, or severely discolored teeth. This quick, minimally invasive procedure is completed in a single visit and perfectly matches your natural tooth shade.

services.title: Routine Check-ups
services.name: Check-ups
services.description: Prevention is the foundation of oral health. Our comprehensive check-ups include a thorough examination of your teeth, gums, and oral tissues. We perform oral cancer screenings, assess bite alignment, and identify early signs of decay to prevent complex issues down the road.

services.title: Cosmetic Procedures
services.name: Cosmetic Procedures
services.description: Transform your appearance with a complete smile makeover. Our cosmetic procedures are tailored to your facial aesthetics, combining treatments like contouring, whitening, and veneers to correct imperfections and give you the flawless, camera-ready smile you’ve always desired.

services.title: Dental Implants
services.name: Dental Implants
services.description: Replace missing teeth permanently with our state-of-the-art dental implants. Crafted from biocompatible titanium, these artificial tooth roots integrate seamlessly with your jawbone, providing a sturdy foundation for natural-looking crowns that restore 100% of your chewing functionality.

services.title: Dentures & Bridges
services.name: Dentures & Bridges
services.description: Regain your smile and confidence with custom-crafted dentures and bridges. Whether you need partial bridges to fill specific gaps or full dentures for complete arch replacement, our prosthetics are designed using advanced impressions for a secure, comfortable, and aesthetic fit.

services.title: Emergency Dental Care
services.name: Emergency Care
services.description: Dental emergencies don't wait, and neither do we. We provide immediate, priority care for severe toothaches, knocked-out teeth, broken crowns, and facial swelling. Our goal is to alleviate your pain instantly and perform emergency interventions to save your natural teeth.

services.title: Tooth Extractions
services.name: Extractions
services.description: When a tooth is too damaged to save, our painless extraction procedures ensure safe removal. Using localized anesthesia and gentle surgical techniques, we extract severely decayed teeth, impacted teeth, and root fragments while ensuring a smooth and rapid recovery process.

services.title: Fillings and Sealants
services.name: Fillings & Sealants
services.description: Protect your teeth from decay with our durable fillings and preventive sealants. We use highly aesthetic, mercury-free composite resins that blend invisibly with your teeth. Our pit and fissure sealants provide an invisible shield over molars, effectively blocking cavity-causing bacteria.

services.title: Laser Dentistry
services.name: Laser Dentistry
services.description: Experience the future of oral care with minimally invasive laser dentistry. Our precision lasers allow for stitch-free soft tissue surgeries, painless cavity preparation, and rapid gum disease treatments. Enjoy reduced bleeding, fewer drill noises, and significantly faster healing times.

services.title: Mouth Guards
services.name: Mouth Guards
services.description: Protect your smile with our custom-fitted mouth guards. Unlike over-the-counter options, our clinic-made guards offer superior protection and comfort for contact sports. We also design specialized night guards to alleviate TMJ pain and prevent enamel wear caused by teeth grinding (bruxism).

services.title: Oral Surgery
services.name: Oral Surgery
services.description: Our highly skilled oral surgeons perform a wide range of complex procedures, including bone grafting for implants, sinus lifts, and facial trauma repair. We operate in a sterile, state-of-the-art surgical suite with advanced sedation options to guarantee your absolute comfort.

services.title: Kids Dentistry (Paediatrics)
services.name: Paediatrics (Kids)
services.description: Give your child the gift of a lifetime of healthy smiles. Our pediatric specialists create a fun, fear-free environment for kids. From the first baby tooth to adolescent braces, we provide gentle cleanings, fluoride varnishes, and education on proper brushing habits.

services.title: Root Canal Treatment
services.name: Root Canals
services.description: Save your natural tooth and eliminate severe pain with our advanced endodontic therapy. Using digital imaging and rotary instruments, we meticulously remove infected pulp, sterilize the root canals, and seal the tooth. The procedure is as comfortable as getting a routine filling.

services.title: Teeth Cleaning & Scaling
services.name: Teeth Cleaning
services.description: Maintain vibrant oral health with our professional cleaning and ultrasonic scaling services. We carefully remove hardened plaque (tartar) from above and below the gumline, followed by an intensive polishing that removes surface stains and leaves your mouth feeling incredibly fresh.

services.title: Teeth Reshaping (Contouring)
services.name: Teeth Reshaping
services.description: Correct minor cosmetic flaws instantly with enamel reshaping. We subtly contour the edges of your teeth to fix uneven lengths, slight overlaps, and jagged edges. This fast, painless procedure requires no anesthesia and immediately improves the harmony of your smile.

services.title: Veneers & Crowns
services.name: Veneers & Crowns
services.description: Achieve a Hollywood smile with our custom porcelain veneers and crowns. Veneers act as ultra-thin shields to mask discoloration and gaps, while crowns provide full structural protection for damaged teeth. Crafted from premium ceramics, they reflect light exactly like natural enamel.

services.title: Digital X-Ray & OPG
services.name: X-ray & OPG
services.description: Precision diagnostics are key to effective treatment. Our clinic is equipped with advanced digital radiography and Orthopantomogram (OPG) machines that capture high-resolution panoramic views of your entire jaw, teeth, and roots with 90% less radiation than traditional X-rays.

services.title: Ceramic & Self-Ligating Braces
services.name: Ceramic Braces
services.description: Straighten your teeth effectively without the metallic look. Our tooth-colored ceramic braces blend in with your enamel for a highly discreet appearance. We also offer advanced self-ligating braces that reduce friction, require fewer adjustments, and significantly shorten overall treatment time.

services.title: Clear Aligners
services.name: Clear Aligners
services.description: Achieve a perfectly straight smile invisibly. Clear aligners are custom-made, transparent plastic trays that gently shift your teeth into place. They are completely removable, allowing you to eat your favorite foods and maintain your normal brushing routine without restrictions.

services.title: Wisdom Teeth Removal
services.name: Wisdom Teeth
services.description: Impacted wisdom teeth can cause severe pain, crowding, and infection. Our maxillofacial specialists perform safe, swift extractions of problematic third molars. Using 3D imaging to map nerve pathways, we ensure a highly precise surgery with an optimized, comfortable recovery plan.

services.title: BPS Dentures
services.name: BPS Dentures
services.description: Experience the pinnacle of denture technology with the Biofunctional Prosthetic System (BPS). These premium dentures are fabricated using sophisticated techniques to mirror the natural movements of your jaw, offering unparalleled stability, enhanced chewing efficiency, and lifelike aesthetics.

services.title: Mouth Ulcers Treatment
services.name: Mouth Ulcers
services.description: Chronic mouth ulcers can be debilitating. Our specialists accurately diagnose the root cause—whether nutritional, immune-related, or viral—and provide targeted relief. We offer soothing topical medications, laser cauterization, and comprehensive management plans to prevent recurrence.

services.title: Preventive Dentistry
services.name: Preventive Dentistry
services.description: Stop dental problems before they start. Our preventive programs include deep fluoride applications, dietary counseling, and personalized oral hygiene instruction. We focus on preserving your natural teeth for a lifetime, saving you from complex and costly future procedures.

services.title: Advanced Gum Treatment
services.name: Gum Treatment
services.description: Healthy gums are the foundation of healthy teeth. We treat all stages of periodontal (gum) disease using advanced techniques like deep root planing, localized antibiotic therapy, and soft tissue grafting to halt bone loss, eliminate bad breath, and reverse gum recession.

services.title: Corrective Jaw Surgery
services.name: Jaw Surgery
services.description: Orthognathic (jaw) surgery corrects severe skeletal irregularities that orthodontics alone cannot fix. Whether addressing sleep apnea, severe underbites, or TMJ disorders, our surgeons realign your jaws to dramatically improve chewing, breathing, speaking, and overall facial balance.

services.title: Laser Root Canal Treatment
services.name: Laser Root Canal
services.description: Traditional root canals rely purely on mechanical cleaning. By integrating laser technology, we are able to reach deep into microscopic tubules to eradicate bacteria completely. This results in superior sterilization, a higher success rate, and considerably less post-operative discomfort.

services.title: Special Care Dentistry
services.name: Special Care Dentistry
services.description: We believe everyone deserves excellent dental care. Our facility is fully equipped to accommodate patients with physical disabilities, medical complexities, or severe dental anxiety. We provide customized, compassionate care plans, including full IV sedation when necessary.

services.title: Photobiomodulation (LLLT)
services.name: Photobiomodulation
services.description: Accelerate your healing process with Photobiomodulation. Using low-level red and near-infrared light, this innovative therapy stimulates cellular repair, significantly reduces inflammation, and relieves pain following surgeries or TMJ flare-ups, all without the use of medication.

values.title: Patient-First Care
values.description: Every decision we make is guided by what's best for our patients' oral health and overall well-being.

values.title: Clinical Excellence
values.description: We invest in the latest technology and continuous education to deliver the highest standard of care.

values.title: Trust & Transparency
values.description: Honest diagnosis, clear pricing, and no unnecessary treatments — we earn your trust every visit.

values.title: Personalized Approach
values.description: Customized treatment plans tailored to each patient's unique dental needs and aesthetic goals.

values.title: Comfort & Compassion
values.description: From our calming clinic environment to painless procedures, your comfort is always our priority.

values.title: Continuous Innovation
values.description: Adopting breakthrough techniques and materials to provide faster, safer, and more effective treatments.

milestones.title: The Beginning
milestones.description: Heshvitha Dental founded with a single chair clinic in Kandukur.

milestones.title: Expanding Horizons
milestones.description: Grew to a full multi-specialty dental hospital with 5 treatment rooms and 6 specialists.

milestones.title: Technology Leap
milestones.description: Introduced 3D CBCT imaging, laser dentistry, and digital smile design technology.

milestones.title: 10,000 Smiles
milestones.description: Crossed 10,000 successful treatments. Launched Invisalign and implant specialty center.

milestones.title: Leading the Way
milestones.description: Recognized as one of Kandukur's top-rated dental hospitals with 20,000+ patients served.

contactInfo.address: 2 Floor, Heshvitha Dental, Government Hospital, Road, above New SBI Bank, opposite Muppa Roshaiah Hospital, Kota Reddy Nagar, Kandukur, Andhra Pradesh 523105
